UndergroundChanges_1.TutorialText_11_F5F98E9C47DA80DC659CA998:
NSLOCTEXT("", "A1822D8B4D85C86B5E4C24A8E6B3E7A7", "The active geological activity of this part of <Important>Meridian</> causes frequent shifts in the underground.

Primarily, resource <Important>Nodes</> may appear, disappear or change type entirely as these tremors occur.

It is recommended you revisit previously explored areas after tremors occur, if you are in need of <Important>resources</>.

These effects will become more significant the deeper within the planet you descend.")
